pros: Class-leading fuel efficiency at 24.8 kmpl
Peppy and fun-to-drive character
Widespread service network across India
cons: Boot space is on the smaller side
Rear seat comfort could be better
tagline: The original hot hatch that still rules Indian streets.

pros: Spacious premium cabin for the segment
Large 318L boot is best-in-class
Smooth ride quality on varied roads
cons: No 6-airbag option on base trims
Suspension tuning feels slightly soft on highways
tagline: More space, more premium, more Baleno.

pros: Feature-loaded with sunroof and wireless charging
Sharp sporty styling that stands out

cons: Priced slightly higher than direct rivals

tagline: The hatchback that dares to be different.

pros: 5-star Global NCAP safety rating
Highest ground clearance in the segment at 187mm
SUV-inspired stance with micro-SUV styling
cons: Turbo variant costs significantly more
Rear legroom is limited for adults
tagline: Micro-SUV heart in a hatchback body.

pros: 5-star Global NCAP crash test rating
Premium interior quality rivals sedans
Stable and confidence-inspiring ride dynamics
cons: No automatic gearbox option
Turbo petrol variant is pricey

pros: Excellent fuel efficiency for city driving
Tall-boy design offers impressive headroom
Easy to maneuver in tight city traffic

tagline: India's most practical family hatchback, decade after decade.

pros: Comfortable ride quality on city roads
Feature-rich infotainment for the price

cons: Boot space is the smallest in the segment

tagline: City smarts wrapped in a compact, cheerful package.

pros: 5-star Global NCAP safety rating — safest in class

pros: Best-in-class fuel efficiency at nearly 20 kmpl
HUD display and panoramic sunroof at this price
Strong resale value and low running costs

No diesel engine option

pros: Connected car technology with BlueLink

pros: Exceptional diesel fuel efficiency at 24.1 kmpl
Largest boot space in the compact SUV segment
Premium Bose audio system available

pros: Most affordable compact SUV under 10 lakh
360-degree camera at this price is remarkable
Good ride height and road presence
cons: Very poor 1-star NCAP safety rating
Turbo engine feels strained on highways

pros: Largest boot space in the compact SUV class at 405L
Turbo CVT combination is smooth and efficient
French styling with a bold panoramic sunroof

Rear legroom is tight for taller passengers

pros: Refined Honda engine with low NVH

Strong Honda brand reliability and resale value

No diesel engine option anymore
tagline: Honda reliability meets compact SUV versatility.

pros: 5-star Global NCAP rating with 7 airbags standard

Best-in-class safety features at every trim
cons: Smallest boot space in the class at 257L
No rear AC vents on lower variants
tagline: The safest compact SUV, period.

pros: Panoramic sunroof and ADAS Level 2 safety suite

pros: Premium Bose 8-speaker sound system
Dual panoramic sunroof on top trims

cons: DCT gearbox can be jerky in slow traffic

pros: Czech design ethos with premium interior craftsmanship

pros: Massive 14-inch portrait touchscreen feels futuristic
Largest boot space in the mid-SUV segment at 587L

Infotainment can feel laggy occasionally

pros: 456km ARAI range on a single charge

Peppy electric motor with instant torque delivery

pros: Best-in-class 220mm ground clearance handles anything

pros: Industry-best 27.97 kmpl hybrid efficiency
Self-charging hybrid needs no plug-in infrastructure

cons: Premium price over comparable non-hybrid rivals

pros: 5-star Global NCAP safety with ADAS Level 2

5-star Global NCAP safety rating

pros: 7-seat capability with a genuinely usable third row

225mm ground clearance with proven 4x4 capability
Extremely reliable with low long-term ownership costs
cons: Very high price for what is relatively aging tech
Cabin feels less premium than European rivals at this price
tagline: The prestige SUV that never loses its crown.

pros: Authentic Jeep Trail Rated 4x4 off-road capability

ADAS suite with 70+ safety and driver assist features

pros: Best-in-segment 528L boot space
Turbo petrol DCT is quick and responsive
ADAS Level 2 with 19 safety features

Premium pricing over the City

pros: Most engaging drive in the segment with 150PS

tagline: The MPV that drives like an SUV and feels like a premium car.

pros: Legendary Toyota reliability with best-in-class residuals

Body-on-frame means ride isn't as car-like

pros: 453km ARAI-claimed range tackles range anxiety effectively
5-star Global NCAP safety rating
V2L capability lets you power appliances on the go

tagline: India's most affordable electric car that makes EV sense.

cons: Charging time with AC charger is lengthy at 8.5 hours

pros: Blade Battery technology with best-in-class safety

cons: BYD service network is still developing in India

pros: 473km ARAI range in a familiar, trusted Creta package

AC fast charging takes about 10.5 hours from near-empty

pros: Exceptional 31.2 km/kg CNG efficiency cuts running costs dramatically

tagline: Micro SUV meets maximum savings — the ultimate city budget car.
